summary: Matched a large slice of game-mode code centered on src/melee/gm/gm_1B03.c, adding MinorScene tables, BSS/static storage, typed scene callbacks, match/result helpers, and audio/unload scene setup routines. The decomp.dev bot reported +3456 matched bytes, 25 new 100% matches, and one gm_1B03 function improved to 89.58%, with only a small gmvsmelee unmatched regression.
what_changed: Implemented many formerly stubbed gm_1B03 functions, including gm_801B0348, gm_801B05F4, gm_801B0620, gm_801B0664, gm_801B087C, gm_801B099C, gm_801B09C0, fn_801B09F8, gm_801B0A34, fn_801B0A8C, gm_801B0AC8, gm_801B0B00, gm_801B0B24, gm_801B0B48, gm_801B0BF0, gm_801B0C18, gm_801B0C50, gm_801B0CF0, gm_801B0F1C, gm_801B0F90, and completed gm_801B0FF8.

Added several gm_1B03 MinorScene arrays, including gm_803DD6A0_MinorScenes, gm_803DD6D0_MinorScenes, gm_803DD9A0_MinorScenes, gm_803DDA78_MinorScenes, and additional static/extern storage for scene payloads.
Updated gm_1B03.h from broad UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes to typed MinorScene*, StartMeleeData*, MatchEnd*, PlayerInitData*, and int callback signatures across many gm_1B03 functions.
Implemented gm_80168F88 in gm_1601.c as an audio setup sequence using lbAudioAx_80026F2C, lbAudioAx_8002702C, lbAudioAx_80027168, and lbAudioAx_80027648.
Changed gm_8016A21C and gm_8016A92C to take StartMeleeRules* and use struct fields x54/x58 instead of M2C_FIELD or a temporary gm_8016A92C_arg0_t.
Added a new gm_1BFA.h header declaring scene callbacks such as gm_801BFA6C, gm_801BFABC, and gm_801BFCFC for use by gm_1B03 MinorScene tables.
Implemented gmresultplayer gm_80177724(MatchExitInfo*) as a memzero of the exit info structure.

Reworked gmvsmelee matching around result flow: gm_801A5F64 reached 100%, gm_801A5680 reached 100%, gm_801A52D0 is reused instead of open-coded active-player detection, and gm_801A5F00 now treats minor scene data as MatchExitInfo.
Adjusted struct definitions in gm/types.h, including annotated MinorScene offsets, gmm_retval_ED98 x0, MatchPlayerData signedness/bitfield/x28 fields, and MatchEnd padding.
Updated PlayerInitData x7 subcolor and x9 team fields in mn/types.h from signed to unsigned u8.
Updated lbaudio_ax.h so lbAudioAx_80026E84 takes int rather than s8.
Updated un_2FC9.h includes and prototypes for un_802FFEE0, un_802FFF2C, un_80301BA8, and un_80301C64.
Adjusted config/GALE01/splits.txt BSS ownership: gmvsmelee.c now owns 0x80479D98-0x8047C020, while gm_1A4C.c BSS begins at 0x8047C020.
smart_moves: Converted unknown callback prototypes to MinorScene* broadly, which made MinorScene table entries and callback bodies line up naturally instead of forcing UNK_PARAMS.
Used shared helpers already present in gmvsmelee, especially gm_801A52D0 for detecting active players and gm_801A5258 for KO star/time aggregation, instead of preserving duplicated control flow.
Introduced typed StartMeleeData, StartMeleeRules, MatchEnd, MatchExitInfo, and PlayerInitData usage to replace raw UNK_T and M2C_FIELD access where field layout was known.
Recovered BSS/data layout by explicitly adding static arrays sized from address ranges and updating splits.txt BSS boundaries.
Factored small inline helpers for gm_801B0474/player standings logic, helping the function improve substantially even though it did not fully match.
Matched audio setup routines by recognizing repeated lbAudioAx call sequences used across announcer/menu/scene transitions.
Added the missing gm_1BFA header instead of relying on undeclared cross-file callbacks in MinorScene data.
decomp_lessons: Scene-table-heavy game-mode files often need data/BSS reconstruction and callback prototype cleanup before many small functions will match.
For MinorScene callbacks, prefer typed void callback(MinorScene*) signatures and access payloads through gm_801A427C/gm_801A4284 plus scene->info rather than inventing per-function ad hoc structs.
When a function manipulates match-start or result data, check whether StartMeleeData, StartMeleeRules, MatchEnd, MatchExitInfo, and PlayerInitData already encode the offsets before using M2C_FIELD.
Signedness matters for matching: this PR changed fields such as MatchPlayerData.character_id/stocks and PlayerInitData subcolor/team to match observed codegen.
Bitfields can be necessary for exact layout/codegen, as shown by MatchPlayerData x3 becoming a 6-bit field.
BSS split ownership can move when globals are recovered; keep config/GALE01/splits.txt synchronized with newly identified static storage.
Small library prototypes can unblock caller matching; lbAudioAx_80026E84(int) avoided casts in gmvsmelee, and un_2FC9 prototypes documented scene payload types.
A simple memzero wrapper can be a real match when the structure type is known, as with gm_80177724(MatchExitInfo*).
naming_conventions: Unidentified functions retained address-based names such as gm_801B0348, fn_801B09F8, and gm_801A5F64.
MinorScene arrays were named with symbol address and purpose suffix, e.g. gm_803DD6A0_MinorScenes.
Lifecycle callbacks kept established suffixes when present, such as gm_80177368_OnEnter, gm_80177704_OnLeave, and gm_801737E8_OnLoad.
New headers used subsystem/address naming, e.g. src/melee/gm/gm_1BFA.h.
Typed structs use project names when known, such as StartMeleeData, StartMeleeRules, MatchEnd, MatchExitInfo, PlayerInitData, MinorScene, and VsModeData.
Temporary unknown globals remain address-based with gm_804... names and UNK_T arrays when semantics are not yet known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Recovered exact global/BSS layout with static arrays sized by byte ranges, including 0x2288/4 and similar storage blocks.
Used explicit casts where required by codegen, such as assigning &lbl_8046B488 to StartMeleeRules.x54 as void* and &lbl_8046B668 to x58 as int.
Replaced an unnecessary temporary allocation variable in gm_801B0FF8 by passing two HSD_MemAlloc calls directly to lbSnap_8001E218, improving the remaining mismatch.
Used local variable type adjustments in gmvsmelee, such as int next_scene and u8 unk, to match result-exit control flow.
Reused returned values in conditional assignments like else-if ((unk = gm_80172D78()) != 0x21) to avoid duplicate calls and match branch structure.
Used inline helper functions for repeated nested logic in gm_801B0474, but evidence shows this function was still only 89.58% matched.
Updated prototypes and callsites together so implicit casts disappeared, for example lbAudioAx_80026E84(int) and gm_801736E8's third parameter as int.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported 34.45% matched code for GALE01, a +0.09% improvement and +3456 bytes.
The bot reported 25 new matches, including gmvsmelee gm_801A5F64, many gm_1B03 callbacks/helpers, gm_1601 gm_80168F88, gmresultplayer gm_80177724, and gmvsmelee gm_801A5680.
The bot reported gm_1B03 gm_801B0474 improved from 0.00% to 89.58%.
The bot reported one regression in unmatched code: gmvsmelee gm_801A5F00 changed from 80.00% to 72.00% despite related result-flow cleanup.
follow_up_queries: Investigate remaining mismatch in gm_801B0474, which improved to 89.58% but did not fully match.
Review gmvsmelee gm_801A5F00 after the MatchExitInfo refactor because the bot reported a small unmatched regression.
Continue replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes in gm_1B03.h beyond the region touched by this PR, using MinorScene* where scene-table callbacks prove it.
Resolve semantics for newly added gm_1B03 BSS arrays and address-based globals such as gm_80480F20, gm_804831A8, gm_80485454, and gm_804D68A4_pad.
Validate whether the comment 'file boundary?' near gm_804D68A4_pad indicates a real split/layout issue needing future cleanup.
Use gm_1BFA.h declarations to decompile or type the gm_801BFA6C/gm_801BFABC/gm_801BFCFC scene callbacks referenced by gm_1B03.
